channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Trendlines March 2026 Newsletter
item.description: This edition of Trendlines covers March 2026.

item.title: A Federal Statistical System for the Age of Economic Security
item.description: Statistics are not a technical afterthought—they are the bedrock of economic security. This report examines how federal data shape U.S. competitiveness, where gaps remain, and what it will take to build a statistical system fit for modern geopolitical competition.

item.title: Europe Needs Bold Economic Action in the Face of the Iran Shock
item.description: As the war in Iran disrupts global energy markets, Europe cannot afford to wait. The European Union must launch a bold, collectively financed response—accelerating electrification, supporting Ukraine, and finally building a true European energy union.

item.title: Visualizing Iran’s Escalation Strategy
item.description: Iran is abandoning calibrated retaliation for rapid escalation—expanding the war across the region and raising stakes globally. The Middle East Program breaks down Tehran’s strategy with two new charts mapping horizontal and vertical escalation.
